center.name: Western Bonelli's warbler
center.summary: Western Bonelli's warbler是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Eastern Bonelli's warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (2002): "Taxonomic recommendations for European birds. " Ibis 144(1): 153–159. * Western Bonelli's warbler, Phylloscopus bonelli, which breeds in southwest Europe and north Africa * Eastern Bonelli's warbler, Phylloscopus orientalis, which breeds in southeast Europe and Asia Minor The breeding ranges of the two species do not overlap; while their appearance and songs are very similar, the calls are completely different (see below)
